# Calkilo

> Calkilo is an AI calorie counter and nutrition assistant that helps people estimate food calories from photos, track macros, keep a daily food log, and plan meals.

Last updated: 2026-07-02

## Product summary
- Product type: AI calorie tracker and nutrition app
- Platforms: iOS and Android
- Core use cases: photo calorie estimation, macro tracking, daily nutrition logging, meal planning, progress tracking
- Integrations: Apple Health, Google Fit, Fitbit, Samsung Health
- Languages with public landing content: English, Persian, Italian, Dutch, Russian, Chinese, and Arabic

## Official product pages
- Home: https://calkilo.com/
- About Calkilo: https://calkilo.com/about/
- Features: https://calkilo.com/features/
- Pricing: https://calkilo.com/pricing/
- FAQ: https://calkilo.com/faq/
- Blog: https://calkilo.com/blog/

## Calculators and guides
- Daily calorie calculator: https://calkilo.com/calorie-calculator/
- AI calorie tracker: https://calkilo.com/ai-calorie-tracker/
- Photo calorie calculator: https://calkilo.com/photo-calorie-calculator/
- Macro tracker: https://calkilo.com/macro-tracker/
- AI meal planner for weight loss: https://calkilo.com/ai-meal-planner-for-weight-loss/
- Best calorie counter for Persian food: https://calkilo.com/best-calorie-counter-for-persian-food/
- Calkilo vs MyFitnessPal: https://calkilo.com/calkilo-vs-myfitnesspal/

## Persian food and photo-calorie pages
- Persian homepage: https://calkilo.com/fa/
- Persian photo calorie calculator: https://calkilo.com/fa/photo-calorie-calculator/
- Persian AI calorie calculator: https://calkilo.com/fa/ai-calorie-calculator/
- Persian food calorie scanner: https://calkilo.com/fa/food-calorie-scanner/
- Iranian food calorie examples: https://calkilo.com/fa/calories/kebab/
- Iranian food calorie examples: https://calkilo.com/fa/calories/rice/

## Best fit
- People who prefer photo-first meal logging
- People tracking calories, protein, carbohydrates, and fat
- People using Persian-language nutrition guides or logging Iranian meals
- People who want meal planning connected to an ongoing nutrition log

## Important limitations
- Food-photo analysis produces estimates, not laboratory measurements.
- Portion size, oils, sauces, hidden ingredients, and image quality can change an estimate.
- Calkilo is not a substitute for medical advice or a prescribed therapeutic diet.

## Store links
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.calkilo.mobile&hl=fa
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/calkilo-ai-calorie-counter/id6755718411
